description: Tests that the plugin is correctly invoked (or correctly silent) and that every output always contains all required sections: Call graph, Latency, Energy, Execution fit. Uses functions compiled into $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/CC2340R5/basic_ble.out.
note: Set $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT to your local BLE project root before running.

evals.prompt: Implement a retry loop inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that retries up to 3 times if the connection handle is invalid before returning an error.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required lines — Call graph, Latency, Energy, Execution fit — before any code or edit steps.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'implement' keyword must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use one of the three allowed values

evals.prompt: Add a method to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c that also returns the bond index as an output parameter alongside the existing return value.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required lines before the implementation plan.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'add a method' keyword must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present and use one of the three allowed values

evals.prompt: How should I modify osal_set_event in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/osal/src/common/osal.c to also log the event to a ring buffer before posting, so we can replay events in the debugger?
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required lines before the plan.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'how should I modify' must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present

evals.prompt: /plan Add a per-connection packet counter inside HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c that increments a uint32_t in the connection record on every successful send.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required lines as part of the plan, before the edit steps.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: /plan must trigger the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present

evals.prompt: Think through how to add a watchdog reset inside GAPBondMgr_ProcessEvent in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c if the bond manager has been stuck processing the same event for more than 5 seconds.
evals.expected_output: A preflight block with all required lines before the design discussion.

assertions.text: Response includes a '## Preflight:' section header
assertions.description: 'think through how to add' triggers the skill

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Call graph:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains a 'Latency:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: All required checks must be present

assertions.text: Preflight block contains an 'Execution fit:' line with value GOOD, ADJUST PLAN, or STOP
assertions.description: Execution fit must be present

evals.prompt: Explain what GAPBondMgr_Init does in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/host/gapbondmgr.c and what each parameter controls.
evals.expected_output: A plain explanation with no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' or 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: Explain is read-only — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: Show me the body of osal_set_event in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/osal/src/common/osal.c — I want to understand how it dispatches events before I make any changes.
evals.expected_output: Display of the function body with no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' or 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: Read-only with explicit 'before I make changes' — skill must stay silent

evals.prompt: Review HCI_SendDataPkt in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/hci/cc26xx/hci.c for potential issues. Don't change anything yet — just tell me what you find.
evals.expected_output: A code review with observations and no preflight block.

assertions.text: Response does NOT contain a '## Preflight:' header or 'Call graph:' or 'Energy:' line
assertions.description: 'don't change anything yet' is explicit analysis mode — preflight is premature
